_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: SpliceAI had a slightly higher sensitivity (difference 11.0%, p = 0.0636) and significantly higher specificity (difference 11.8%, p = 0.0003) compared with MES/SSF.
details: Significantly higher specificity than MES/SSF (difference 11.8%, p = 0.0003) and slightly higher sensitivity (difference 11.0%, p = 0.0636)
